reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. Empleados de gasolineras agresivos y con poca educación. No recomendado para turistas por prejuicios. Tenga cuidado de no ser atacado.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Gas station employees are aggressive and rude. Not recommended for tourists due to prejudice. Be careful not to be attacked.

reviews.comment:
El más completo en su rubro.Las islas de carga siempre ordenadas ,y la atención de los playeros muy buena .La sección turismo espectacular,la información y cartografía ,

(Translated by Google)
The most complete in its category. The loading bays are always tidy, and the service from the attendants is very good. The tourism section is spectacular, with excellent information and maps.
